hotels.name: Badry Sahara Camp
hotels.description_fr:
Situé à Bawati, l’établissement Badry Sahara Camp propose une piscine extérieure, une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite, un jardin et une terrasse.
Cet établissement dispose d’un barbecue.
Un service de location de vélos est assuré sur place.
Les couples apprécient particulièrement l'emplacement de cet établissement. Ils lui donnent la note de 9,1 pour un séjour à deux.
Les distances indiquées dans la description de l'établissement sont calculées avec © OpenStreetMap.
hotels.description_en:
Essential Facilities: Badry Sahara Camp in Bawiti offers a sun terrace, garden, restaurant, and outdoor swimming pool. Free WiFi is available throughout the property.
Comfortable Accommodations: Rooms include private bathrooms with mountain views, ground-floor units, work desks, and shared bathrooms. Additional amenities feature slippers, TV, and showers.
Convenient Services: The camp provides a paid airport shuttle, 24-hour front desk, concierge service, shared kitchen, family rooms, room service, bike hire, barbecue facilities, tour desk, and luggage storage. Free on-site private parking is provided.
Guest Satisfaction: Highly rated by guests, Badry Sahara Camp ensures a pleasant stay with its excellent facilities and services.
Couples particularly like the location — they rated it 9.
hotels.description_es:
Badry Sahara Camp se encuentra en Bawiti y ofrece alojamiento con piscina al aire libre, wifi gratis, jardín y terraza.
Badry Sahara Camp ofrece servicio de alquiler de bicicletas.
A las parejas les encanta la ubicación — Le han puesto un 9,1 para viajes de dos personas.
Las distancias en la descripción del alojamiento se calculan con OpenStreetMap©
hotels.description_pt:
Badry Sahara Camp localiza-se em Bawati e fornece acomodações com piscina exterior, acesso Wi-Fi gratuito, um jardim e um terraço.
Badry Sahara Camp oferece comodidades para churrascos.
Badry Sahara Camp disponibiliza um serviço de aluguer de bicicletas.
Os casais gostam particularmente da localização – deram uma pontuação de 9,1 para uma viagem a dois.
A distância mencionada na descrição do alojamento é calculada com o © OpenStreetMap
hotels.description_it:
Badry Sahara Camp si trova a Bawati e prevede una piscina all'aperto, WiFi gratuito, un giardino e una terrazza. C’è un parcheggio privato disponibile sul posto.
Questo campeggio offre un barbecue.
Un servizio di noleggio biciclette è disponibile presso Badry Sahara Camp.
Le coppie apprezzano molto la posizione: l'hanno valutata 9,1 per un viaggio a due.
Le distanze nella descrizione della struttura sono calcolate con © OpenStreetMap

hotels.name: Egypt white and black desert with Camping
hotels.description_fr:
Situé à Az Zabū, l’établissement Egypt white and black desert with Camping propose des hébergements dotés d’un coin salon.

Vous bénéficierez d’une salle de bains privative entièrement équipée avec un bidet et des articles de toilette gratuits.

Un petit-déjeuner continental, anglais/irlandais complet ou italien est servi sur place.

Les distances indiquées dans la description de l'établissement sont calculées avec © OpenStreetMap.
hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodation: Egypt white and black desert with Camping in Az Zabū offers family rooms recently renovated with private bathrooms. Each room includes air-conditioning, a refrigerator, and a wardrobe.
Modern Amenities: Guests can enjoy free toiletries, a tea and coffee maker, and a dining area. Additional features include a barbecue, outdoor furniture, and a spa bath.
Dining Options: Breakfast options include continental, American, Italian, full English/Irish, vegetarian, vegan, halal, gluten-free, and kosher.
Outdoor Activities: The property provides mountain views and an outdoor dining area, ideal for relaxation and leisure.
Distance in property description is calculated using © OpenStreetMap
hotels.description_es:
Egypt white and black desert with Camping se encuentra en Az Zabū y ofrece alojamiento con zona de estar.

Todas las unidades tienen baño privado totalmente equipado con bidet y artículos de aseo gratuitos.

En el alojamiento se puede disfrutar de un desayuno continental, inglés/irlandés completo o italiano.

Las distancias en la descripción del alojamiento se calculan con OpenStreetMap©

Existe uma casa de banho privativa totalmente equipada com bidé e produtos de higiene pessoal gratuitos.
